consentBanner.line1: We and selected third parties use cookies or similar technologies for technical purposes and, with your consent, for measurement. Denying consent may make related features unavailable.
consentBanner.line2: You can freely give, deny, or withdraw your consent at any time.
consentBanner.line3: Use the “Accept” button to consent to the use of such technologies. Use the “Reject” button or close this notice to continue without accepting.

settingsModal.AUTH_SESSION_description: LINCS Keycloak store user session login data
settingsModal._ga_ description: Used by Google Analytics to collect data on the number of times a user has visited the website as well as dates for the first and most recent visit.
settingsModal.basic interactions and functionalities d: These trackers are used for LEAF-Writer basic functionalities, which includes the correct identification of web anotation authors and access to repositories git repositories where the user can load and save files. LEAF-Writer is able delivered limited functionalities without these cookies.
settingsModal.cookie usage description: The following panel allows you to customize your consent preferences for the usage of cookies technology to help us achieve the features and activities described below. You may review and change your choices at any time. Please be aware that denying consent for a particular purpose may make related features unavailable. For more details relative to cookies and other sensitive data, please read the full
settingsModal.lw_ description: Store usage data on the browser's local storage (prefer ID / language / storage, recent documents / repositories, XML schemas, etc.)
settingsModal.measurement description: These cookies collect information about how you use the website, which pages you visited and which links you clicked on. All of the data is anonymized and cannot be used to identify you. These trackers help us to measure traffic and analyze your behavior with the goal of improving our service
settingsModal.more information description: For any queries in relation to our policy on cookies and your choices, please
settingsModal.strictly necessary description: Necessary cookies help make a website usable by enabling basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas of the website. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.

warning.mustAcceptCookies_message: You must accept our cookie policies to be able to sign in. Click on the shield icon above.
warning.remove consent basic interactions: <0>Removing consent for</0><1>Basic interactions & functionalities</1><2>will sign you out</2>

error.message404: You either tried some shady route or you came here by mistake. Go back to the <1>main page.</1>

home.subtitle: The XML & RDF online editor of the Linked Editing Academic Framework

error.xml not well-formed message: The document you are trying to upload is not well-formed. Check that it has the XML extension and that it follows proper XML grammar.
